label: Rule Only
summary: Deterministic correlation emits the alert but stops before evidence-rich operator guidance is produced.

currentSlice.title: deny_burst_v1 triggered for service=udp/10004 on device=4c:7b:02:a2:c7:af
currentSlice.focus: The current slice reaches deterministic alerting, then pauses at the manual control boundary because no suggestion packet exists in this branch.

timeline.title: Deterministic threshold crossed
timeline.detail: 200 denies were observed inside the 60 second rule window and emitted a warning alert.

timeline.title: Cluster gate remains below trigger
timeline.detail: Repeated same-key activity stayed visible in watch mode but did not naturally cross the cluster threshold in this branch.

timeline.title: Operator pivots from raw alert context
timeline.detail: The responder must open topology, history, and device posture manually because no synthesized suggestion is available.

timeline.title: Closure path is not advanced
timeline.detail: Execution and feedback stay visible only as a reserved boundary without structured remediation guidance.

controlBoundary.detail: Alert inspection depends on operator synthesis rather than a generated evidence bundle.

exportArtifacts.detail: This branch can export alert and threshold context, but not a suggestion trace or replay-ready decision packet.
